channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 98A: traffic congestion
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion. [On 09.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion.
[On 09.06.2026]

item.title: 16A/47A/92A: traffic congestion
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Line 47A: irregular intervals in both directions. [On 09.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Line 47A: irregular intervals in both directions.
[On 09.06.2026]

item.title: 89A: service disruption
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption. [On 09.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption.
[On 09.06.2026]

item.title: 60A/N60: 60A, N60, N61 RB: Willergasse, Schule0X direction Liesing and Rodaun
item.description: Stop change of lines 60A towards Liesing, N60 towards Rodaun and call bus N61 towards LiesingX Stop: Willergasse, Schule From: WillergasseX 24 To … [22.05.2026 – 11.11.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of lines 60A towards Liesing, N60 towards Rodaun and call bus N61 towards LiesingX Stop: Willergasse, Schule From: WillergasseX 24 To …
[22.05.2026 – 11.11.2026]

item.title: 77A/80A: End of track construction works
item.description: End of the track construction works Lines 77A and 80A return to the normal route after termination of the track construction works for extension of the 18 line. [07.06.2026 – 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
End of the track construction works Lines 77A and 80A return to the normal route after termination of the track construction works for extension of the 18 line.
[07.06.2026 – 30.06.2026]

item.title: S 50: Wien Hütteldorf ↔Wien Westbahnhof ↔XSt. Pölten Hauptbahnhof
item.description: Due to construction works, between Wien Westbahnhof (U) and Wien Hütteldorf Train Station (U) from 02.11.2026 (20:00 o'clock) to 14.11.2026 (17:00 o'clock) some S50 trains … [Since 02.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works, between Wien Westbahnhof (U) and Wien Hütteldorf Train Station (U) from 02.11.2026 (20:00 o'clock) to 14.11.2026 (17:00 o'clock) some S50 trains …
[Since 02.06.2026]

item.title: 47A/N54: diversion direction Unter St. Veit or Westbahnhof
item.description: Because of construction works in the range Hietzinger Kai / Baumgartenbrücke, an diversion is set up. [03.06.2026 – 18.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the range Hietzinger Kai / Baumgartenbrücke, an diversion is set up.
[03.06.2026 – 18.06.2026]

item.title: U2: Facade exchange Sation Seestadt
item.description: Due to construction works in the station area Seestadt, the exit tracks are blocked alternately. [03.06.2026 – 20.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works in the station area Seestadt, the exit tracks are blocked alternately.
[03.06.2026 – 20.06.2026]

item.title: 1/1A/22X/2A/31/3A/59A/71/74A/D: Rainbow Parade 2026 on 1306.2026
item.description: Because of the rainbow parade, the following traffic measures are taking place. [03.06.2026 – 13.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of the rainbow parade, the following traffic measures are taking place.
[03.06.2026 – 13.06.2026]
